description: Heap data structures and memory layout for exploitation reasoning

prev_size.description: Size of previous chunk (if PREV_INUSE=0). Otherwise used as data area of prev chunk.

size.description: Size of this chunk including header. Lower 3 bits are flags.

fd.description: Forward pointer in bin list. Only present when chunk is freed. Overlaps with user data area.
fd.note: In tcache/fastbin, this is XOR-encoded with chunk_addr >> 12 (safe linking, glibc >= 2.32)

bk.description: Backward pointer in bin list. Only present when chunk is freed and in unsorted/small/large bin.

fd_nextsize.description: Forward pointer for next-size list in large bins.

bk_nextsize.description: Backward pointer for next-size list in large bins.

fields.entries: 64 * 8 = 512 bytes (pointers to first chunk in each list)

fastbin.checks: Size check on allocation, no consolidation

unsorted_bin.behavior: First-fit search, exact match or split

small_bin.fd_bk_value: Point to adjacent chunks in list

main_arena.description: Central heap management structure in libc
main_arena.exploitation_use: Unsorted bin FD/BK point to main_arena + 96, enabling libc leak

main_heap.description: Primary heap region, starts at mmap'd address
main_heap.top_chunk: Last chunk in heap, used for allocations when bins are empty

mmap_regions.description: Separate mmap'd regions for large allocations (> mmap_threshold)

top_chunk.description: Special chunk at end of heap, used when bins cannot satisfy request
top_chunk.behavior: If request fits, split top chunk. If not, extend heap via brk().
top_chunk.house_of_force: Overwrite top chunk size to -1 (18446744073709551615) to allocate at arbitrary address

counts.description: Array of 64 bytes, each counting chunks in corresponding tcache bin

entries.description: Array of 64 pointers (8 bytes each), each pointing to first chunk in tcache bin

tcache_perthread_struct.exploitation_use: Overwrite tcache struct to redirect allocations (tcache poisoning variant)

environ.description: libc variable pointing to stack environment pointer
environ.exploitation_use: Leak stack address for ROP chain placement

tcache_key.description: XOR mask used for safe linking of tcache FD pointers
tcache_key.location: Derived from chunk address: key = chunk_addr >> 12
tcache_key.exploitation_use: Leak key to bypass safe linking for tcache poisoning
